title: Response restricted by policy
detail: The requested data cannot be provided under the current policy constraints.
reason: Sensitive fields require additional user-provided justification or narrower scope.

limitations.detail: One or more requested fields are restricted.
The request did not include a user-approved business justification.

next_actions.title: Submit user-approved justification
next_actions.description: Only proceed if the user explicitly confirms the justification text.

agent_guidance: Ask the user for a business justification only if the user intends to proceed.
If the user declines, prefer narrowing the request to non-restricted fields.
